data.title: ARK Invest Bought $9.4M Worth of eToro Shares on Trading Platform's Debut
data.description:
• ARK Invest bought 140,000 shares of eToro worth nearly $9.4 million at the company's closing price of $67.
  • ETOR gained nearly 29% on its first day of trading on the Nasdaq.

data.title: Jim Chanos is Buying Bitcoin and Shorting Strategy
data.description:
• Jim Chanos is long bitcoin and short Strategy, betting on the valuation gaps.
  • Strategy trades at a premium due to its leveraged bitcoin holdings, he argued.
  • Chanos views the company’s valuation as a ‘good barometer’ of retail speculation.

data.title: Dogecoin, Cardano and Solana Slump as Crypto Majors See Profit-Taking After Weeklong Rally
data.description:
• Major cryptocurrencies like Dogecoin, Cardano, and Solana fell over 5% as traders locked in profits after a recent rally.
  • Bitcoin and ether faced resistance after reaching significant price levels, with potential corrections anticipated.
  • Institutional investors continue to accumulate Bitcoin, while Coinbase's upcoming S&P 500 inclusion is expected to boost the sector.

data.title: EToro Stock Surges 29% On First Day Of Trading
data.description:
• Shares of trading platform eToro surged nearly 29% in their Nasdaq debut, closing at $67 after opening well above the IPO price.
  • The company raised approximately $310 million by selling nearly 6 million shares at $52 each, topping its initial price range.
  • eToro is the first major fintech to go public amid a lull in crypto and stock platform IPOs, setting the stage for potential follow-ups from peers like Robinhood and Circle.

data.title: Stablecoins Bring 'Meaningful Innovation for Global Payments,' Ripple Exec Says
data.description:
• Stablecoins are reshaping cross-border payments offering a better alternative to fragmented legacy financial rails, Ripple's Jack McDonald and Kraken's Mark Greenberg said.
  • The future of stablecoins includes yield-bearing options, but regulatory challenges remain.

data.title: Cardano (ADA) Surges 22% in One Week After Brave Browser Boosts User Exposure
data.description:
• Cardano (ADA) experienced significant price volatility, swinging 5.9% between $0.795 and $0.841 before stabilizing around $0.813-$0.816, according to CoinDesk Research's technical analysis data model.
  • Major partnerships with Grayscale and Brave browser have boosted ADA's profile, with the Brave wallet integration potentially exposing Cardano to over 86 million users.
  • Geopolitical tensions and trade disputes continue to influence cryptocurrency markets, with institutional investors showing increased interest in ADA despite short-term corrections.

data.title: Proven Bitcoin Momentum Indicator Flashes Green, Supporting Analyst $140K-$200K Price Predictions
data.description:
• A key momentum indicator, the MACD histogram, has turned bullish, supporting predictions of a bitcoin rally to $150,000-$200,000.
  • Bitcoin's MACD crossing above zero signals renewed bullish momentum, echoing patterns from mid-2024 and early 2023.

data.title: Chainproof Combats Ethereum ‘Slashing’ Losses With Guaranteed Yearly Yields
data.description:
• Chainproof has launched a new insurance product for Ethereum stakers to protect against slashing and ensure a minimum yearly yield.
  • The product, in partnership with IMA Financial Group, guarantees returns based on the Composite Ether Staking Rate (CESR).

data.title: Telegram Cracks Down on Suspected $8B Chinese Crypto Crime Marketplace Set Up in Colorado
data.description:
• Telegram has shut down thousands of channels linked to suspected Chinese crypto crime marketplaces following a report by blockchain analytics firm Elliptic.
  • The Xinbi Guarantee marketplace, incorporated in Colorado, has processed over $8.4 billion in suspected illicit transactions using Tether's USDT stablecoin since 2022.
  • The U.S. Treasury's Financial Crimes Enforcement Network has designated Huione Group, another major marketplace, as a primary money laundering concern.

data.title: Solana (SOL) Surges 5% on Heavy Volume and Strengthening DeFi Metrics
data.description:
• Solana (SOL) jumps 5% in 24 hours, climbing from $172.53 to $181.39 amid strong volume support and growing DeFi metrics.
  • Geopolitical tensions and trade disputes between major economies create market volatility, with investors seeking refuge in select cryptocurrencies.
  • Solana's DeFi ecosystem shows remarkable growth with total value locked increasing from $7.5 billion to $9.6 billion in May, driving investor confidence.
